message:
🐛 Add timeouts to 2 fetch calls that could hang indefinitely (#10869)

ClusterLocations SVG fetch: add AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_EXTERNAL_TIMEOUT_MS)
combined with the existing AbortController via AbortSignal.any().

useBenchmarkData SSE stream: add connection timeout that aborts if the
server doesn't respond within FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS. Timer is cleared
once the stream connects so the long-lived SSE can run normally.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
